# Fork and Setup Card Conjurer

## Task

Fork the repository `joshbirnholz/cardconjurer` to my GitHub account and set up the local development environment.

## Steps

1. Fork `https://github.com/joshbirnholz/cardconjurer` to my GitHub account
2. Clone the forked repository locally
3. Verify the app runs locally (Python HTTP server on port 8000 or Docker on port 4242)
4. Create the following directory structure for new features:
   - `data/presets/`
   - `data/projects/`
   - `.github/copilot-instructions.md` (copy from project instructions)
   - `.github/prompts/` (copy prompt files)
   - `.github/agents/` (copy agent files)
5. Create initial feature branch: `feature/preset-system`
6. Verify the existing app still works correctly after setup
7. Document any issues found in a `SETUP_NOTES.md` file

## Verification

- [ ] Fork exists on my GitHub account
- [ ] App loads in browser without errors
- [ ] Canvas renders a sample card correctly
- [ ] Directory structure is in place
- [ ] Git is initialized with correct remote
